use_cases: Main navigation bar for SaaS dashboards with visual hover feedback
Application navigation with color-coded menu items by category
User profile and settings navigation with gradient accent effects
ai_summary: A horizontal navigation bar component featuring hover-activated radial gradient backgrounds and color-changing icons using Framer Motion. Each menu item displays a unique accent color on hover with smooth transitions. Supports dark mode variants and includes common app navigation items like Home, Notifications, Messages, Analytics, Settings, Profile, and Help.
